message:
feat(query): enforce STI discriminator filtering in SELECT queries

STI child models now automatically filter by their discriminator value
in all SELECT queries (build_with_dialect, build_eager_with_dialect,
build_exists_subquery_with_dialect). The discriminator WHERE clause
is properly AND-ed with any user-provided filters.

Adds integration test verifying discriminator injection in to_row()
and unit tests for automatic discriminator filtering behavior using
the StiManager test model.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
